text:
ACO_ID 

Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Accountable Care Organizations (ACO) Pioneer 
V2 segment files. Each entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

ACO_ID 

LABEL: Pioneer ACO Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: The identifier of the Pioneer ACO with which the beneficiary is aligned. 

SHORT
